Package com.itu.MarinVuelos.repositories

Interface BaseRepository<E extends Base,Id extends Serializable>

All Superinterfaces:
org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository<E,Id>, org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<E,Id>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListCrudRepository<E,Id>, org.springframework.data.repository.ListPagingAndSortingRepository<E,Id>, org.springframework.data.repository.PagingAndSortingRepository<E,Id>, org.springframework.data.repository.query.QueryByExampleExecutor<E>, org.springframework.data.repository.Repository<E,Id>
All Known Subinterfaces:
AerolineaRepository, AeropuertoRepository, AsientoRepository, AvionRepository, CiudadRepository, ConsultaRepository, PilotoRepository, ReservaRepository, TarifaRepository, TarjetaRepository, UsuarioRepository, VueloRepository
@NoRepositoryBean public interface BaseRepository<E extends Base,Id extends Serializable> extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<E,Id>
